name: CalmKids Academy
targetAudience: Parents of children aged 2-8 who want safe, educational screen time without hyper-stimulation, hidden fees, or frustrating UX.

brand.html: "use client" import { useState, useEffect } from "react" import Script from "next/script" import { Download, Star, CheckCircle2, XCircle, Shield, Zap, Heart, Gift, Lock, Smartphone, ArrowRight, MessageCircle, ChevronRight, Clock, Users, BookOpen, Award } from "lucide-react" export default function CalmKidsAcademyPage() { const [showBottomBar, setShowBottomBar] = useState(false) const [installPrompt, setInstallPrompt] = useState(null) const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false) const [modalTab, setModalTab] = useState("install") const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false) const [submitSuccess, setSubmitSuccess] = useState("") const [submitError, setSubmitError] = useState("") useEffect(() => { if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) { navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js') } const handleScroll = () => { setShowBottomBar(window.scrollY > 800) } window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll) const handleInstallPrompt = (e) => { e.preventDefault() setInstallPrompt(e) } window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handleInstallPrompt) return () => { window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll) window.removeEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handleInstallPrompt) } }, []) const handleInstallClick = () => { if (installPrompt) { installPrompt.prompt() installPrompt.userChoice.then((choiceResult) => { setInstallPrompt(null) }) } else { setShowModal(true) } } const handleModalSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault() setIsSubmitting(true) setSubmitError("") const formData = new FormData(e.target) const email = formData.get('email') const friend1 = formData.get('friend_email_1') const friend2 = formData.get('friend_email_2') const payload = { email, campaign_slug: 'calmkids-academy', brand: 'CalmKids Academy', ...(friend1 && friend2 ? { friend_email_1: friend1, friend_email_2: friend2 } : {}) } try { const response = await fetch('https://jarvis-platform-sigma.vercel.app/api/public/referral/submit', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) }) if (response.ok) { const result = await response.json() if (friend1 && friend2 && result.discount_code) { setSubmitSuccess(`Your code: ${result.discount_code} — emailed to all three of you`) setTimeout(() => setShowModal(false), 5000) } else { setSubmitSuccess("Check your email for the download link") setTimeout(() => setShowModal(false), 2000) } } else { setSubmitError("Something went wrong. Please try again.") } } catch (error) { setSubmitError("Network error. Please try again.") } setIsSubmitting(false) } return (

steps.step: Creating new repo from template: CorySlsbry/Contractor-CFO-Dashboard → calmkids-academy...

brand.tagline: Ad-free, calm, and actually educational screen time for your kids.

pain_points.problem: Educational apps feel like slot machines for toddlers, making them hyperactive and cranky when screen time ends.
pain_points.current_solution: Parents delete the apps and switch back to PBS Kids or YouTube Kids (which has inappropriate content risks).

pain_points.problem: Apps crash or take too long to load, leading to impatient toddlers crying.
pain_points.current_solution: Buying expensive iPads instead of using affordable Android tablets.

brand.win_strategy: Partner with 'mommy bloggers' and gentle-parenting influencers on Instagram/TikTok to review the app as the 'anti-ABCmouse'.
brand.hook_headline: Give your child a 2-grade-level reading advantage in 15 minutes a day, with zero tantrums, zero ads, and zero hidden fees.

review_themes.our_fix: 1-tap Google Play Store subscription management directly linked in the parent dashboard. Transparent billing.
review_themes.sample_quote: There is literally no cancel button in the app. You have to go to a website, jump through 10 hoops, and call customer service. Total scam.

review_themes.our_fix: Build a lightweight, native Android app optimized specifically for lower-end Android tablets (like Amazon Fire and base Samsungs).
review_themes.sample_quote: Takes 5 minutes just to load the home screen. It freezes constantly on my kid's Samsung tablet, causing massive meltdowns.

review_themes.our_fix: Remove all virtual currency. Reward learning with beautifully animated story unlocks, not dopamine-driven shopping simulators.
review_themes.sample_quote: My kid doesn't learn anything. They just click randomly through the math to get 'tickets' so they can buy virtual clothes for their avatar.

brand.risk_reversal: 1-tap cancellation directly in the app. No calling customer service. Try 14 days completely free.
brand.app_description: Ad-free, calm, and actually educational screen time for your kids.
brand.target_audience: Parents of children aged 2-8 who want safe, educational screen time without hyper-stimulation, hidden fees, or frustrating UX.

top_competitors.name: ABCmouse
top_competitors.weakness: Predatory cancellation practices, incredibly slow/laggy interface on standard Android tablets, and distracting 'ticket' economies.

top_competitors.name: Kiddopia
top_competitors.weakness: Bait-and-switch pricing where the app looks free but locks instantly after download, leading to child tantrums.

{ friend_email_1: friend1, friend_email_2: friend2 } : {}) } try { const response = await fetch('https://jarvis-platform-sigma.vercel.app/api/public/referral/submit', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) }) if (response.ok) { const result = await response.json() if (friend1 && friend2 && result.discount_code) { setSubmitSuccess(`Your code: ${result.discount_code} — emailed to all three of you`) setTimeout(() => setShowModal(false), 5000) } else { setSubmitSuccess("Check your email for the download link") setTimeout(() => setShowModal(false), 2000) } } else { setSubmitError("Something went wrong. Please try again.") } } catch (error) { setSubmitError("Network error. Please try again.") } setIsSubmitting(false) } return (
brand.key_differentiator: A calm, low-dopamine educational environment that runs flawlessly on cheap tablets and respects parents' wallets.
must_have_features: Transparent Google Play billing integration (fixes Subscription Trap)
Native, lightweight Android codebase (fixes Laggy & Buggy on Tablets)
Story-based progression instead of coins/gems (fixes Distracting Ticket Economy)
our_10x_advantages: Lightning-fast load times even on $50 Android tablets
Montessori-inspired, low-stimulation UI that prevents dopamine crashes
Zero in-app virtual currencies or avatar shopping malls
Detailed parent dashboard showing exactly what math/reading skills were mastered
brand.target_business_count: ~30 million Google Play Store users in this category
